title: Two branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation
description: This rule checks if two branches in a conditional structure have the same implementation. This can lead to confusion and errors.
message: Two branches in a conditional structure have the same implementation.
recommendation: Refactor the code to avoid duplicate implementations.
why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicate implementations can lead to confusion and errors.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to avoid duplicate implementations.

checks.message: Two branches in a conditional structure have the same implementation.

metadata.title: Two branches in a conditional structure should not have exactly the same implementation
